---
title: "임업통계_인사이트"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, date, description, categories]
  image-height: 180px
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    sidebar: forestry
---

```{=html}
<style>
.forestry-header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a4a1a 0%, #2d6b2d 60%, #3a8c3a 100%);
  color: #f5f0e8;
  padding: 1.4rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.fh-left .fh-title {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem;
}
.fh-left .fh-title span { color: #a8d5a2; }
.fh-left .fh-sub {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  opacity: 0.85;
  margin: 0;
}
.fh-right {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-style: italic;
  border-left: 3px solid #a8d5a2;
  padding-left: 0.9rem;
  opacity: 0.88;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
.topic-chips {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.chip {
  background: #f0f7f0;
  border: 1px solid #2d6b2d;
  color: #1a4a1a;
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.85rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}
</style>

<div class="forestry-header">
  <div class="fh-left">
    <div class="fh-title">🌲 <span>임업통계_인사이트</span></div>
    <div class="fh-sub">산림청·통계청 공공데이터를 기반으로 한 임업 통계 분석 및 시각화</div>
  </div>
  <div class="fh-right">
    임목 생산 · 수출입 · 산림자원 · 정책통계<br>
    데이터로 보는 한국 임업의 현재와 미래
  </div>
</div>

<div class="topic-chips">
  <span class="chip">🪵 임목 생산</span>
  <span class="chip">📦 목재 수출입</span>
  <span class="chip">🌳 산림 면적</span>
  <span class="chip">🔥 산불 통계</span>
  <span class="chip">🌱 조림·육림</span>
  <span class="chip">💹 임산물 가격</span>
  <span class="chip">📈 시계열 분석</span>
  <span class="chip">🗺️ 지역별 분석</span>
</div>
```
